title: Melody Lane
writer: Bernard Feins, Hugh Wedlock Jr., Howard Snyder
actors: Judd McMichael, Ted McMichael, Joe McMichael
plot: J. Roy Thomas, the head of an advertising agency, is getting headaches from trying to find a name-band for a wacky client, McKenzie, who insists on sitting in with the band. As a last resort, Thomas sends agency-employee Patricia ...
